title: t@ruw`ah #8643
definition:
1) alarm, signal, sound of tempest, shout, shout or blast of war or alarm or joy
    1a) alarm of war, war-cry, battle-cry
    1b) blast (for march)
    1c) shout of joy (with religious impulse)
    1d) shout of joy (in general)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) alarm, signal, sound of tempest, shout, shout or blast of war or alarm or joy
    1a) alarm of war, war-cry, battle-cry
    1b) blast (for march)
    1c) shout of joy (with religious impulse)
    1d) shout of joy (in general)

    NASB:  a shout or blast of war, alarm, or joy
